name: L-3 Communications Holdings, Inc.
description: L-3 Communications Holdings, Inc., now known as L3Harris Technologies, Inc. following its 2019 merger with Harris Corporation, is a prominent American technology company and defense contractor. The firm specializes in providing mission-critical solutions for government and commercial customers worldwide, focusing on integrated mission systems, space and airborne systems, and communication systems. As a leading global aerospace and defense technology innovator, L3Harris delivers advanced capabilities across air, land, sea, space, and cyber domains, supporting national security and defense missions with a commitment to rapid innovation and technological excellence.
